commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]

target.title: fix(workboard): filter archived cards in CLI list command
target.body:
## Summary

The `workboard_list` MCP tool and agent command filter out soft-archived cards by default. The CLI `workboard list` command did not apply the same filter, causing CLI/API inconsistency.

Add `.filter((card) => !card.metadata?.archivedAt)` to the CLI list command to match the existing behavior in `command.ts` and `tools.ts`.

Fixes #94555

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed**: The `workboard list` CLI command displayed all cards including soft-archived ones (cards with `metadata.archivedAt` set). The `workboard_list` MCP tool (`tools.ts:257`) and the agent command (`command.ts:97`) already filter out archived cards by default using the same `.filter((card) => !card.metadata?.archivedAt)` guard. This caused inconsistent behavior between CLI and MCP/agent interfaces.

**Real setup tested**:
- **Runtime**: Node v24.13.0, Linux x86_64
- **Test framework**: Vitest
- **Branch**: `fix/issue-94555-workboard-list-filter` on top of `origin/main`

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
1. Checkout `fix/issue-94555-workboard-list-filter` branch
2. Run CLI tests: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/workboard/src/cli.test.ts`
3. Verify the added `.filter((card) => !card.metadata?.archivedAt)` guard at `cli.ts:136` matches the identical filter in `command.ts:97`
4. Confirm the MCP tool in `tools.ts:257` uses the same pattern with an additional `includeArchived` opt-in override

**After-fix evidence**:
```
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/workboard/src/cli.test.ts
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  4 passed (4)
```

**Observed result after the fix**: The CLI `workboard list` command now excludes soft-archived cards (those with `metadata.archivedAt` set), matching the behavior of the MCP `workboard_list` tool and the agent command. The fix is a single `.filter()` line that reuses the same guard pattern already present in `command.ts:97` and `tools.ts:257`.

**What was not tested**: Live Workboard with real archived cards in a production setup. The fix mirrors identical filter logic already shipping in the MCP tool and agent command code paths.

## Tests and validation

```bash
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/workboard/src/cli.test.ts
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  4 passed (4)
```
